inputs.label: Panel Type
inputs.businessContext: Panel type affects complexity and rework time. Standard panels follow IEC 61439, custom panels may require additional engineering.

inputs.label: Rework Scope
inputs.businessContext: Scope defines extent of rework: minor (wiring fixes), moderate (component replacement), major (full redesign). Based on industry practice.

inputs.label: Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage for electricians/technicians. Typical range per Bureau of Labor Statistics.

inputs.label: Number of Panels
inputs.businessContext: Total panels requiring rework. Batch size affects setup time and learning curve.

inputs.label: Material Cost per Panel
inputs.businessContext: Cost of replacement components, wires, connectors. Based on supplier quotes and BOM.

inputs.label: Defect Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of panels with defects requiring rework. Derived from quality control data (Six Sigma).

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy. Low = ±20% uncertainty, Medium = ±10%, High = ±5%. Used for risk adjustment.

thresholds.defectRate > 10: High defect rate indicates process issues; consider root cause analysis.
thresholds.materialCostPerPanel > 1000: Material cost exceeds typical budget; review sourcing.
thresholds.laborRate > 100: Labor rate is above average; verify market rates.

formulas.reworkTimePerPanel: CASE reworkScope WHEN 'minor' THEN 2 WHEN 'moderate' THEN 6 WHEN 'major' THEN 12 ELSE 4 END
formulas.dataConfidenceAdjustedCost: totalReworkCost * CASE dataConfidence WHEN 'low' THEN 1.2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'high' THEN 0.95 ELSE 1.0 END

suggestedActions: defectRate > 10 ? 'Implement root cause analysis and process improvement (Six Sigma DMAIC)' : ''
materialCostPerPanel > 1000 ? 'Negotiate with suppliers or consider alternative components' : ''
laborRate > 100 ? 'Review labor efficiency and consider automation' : ''
